name: Stuffed Red Snapper
recipeIngredient: 4 large red snappers (or 16 -12 oz red snappers)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy pan, make a roux with hot water, butter, and eggs. Cook until thick and smooth over medium heat.
2. Gradually add flour to the roux, stirring constantly until thickened and smooth.
3. In a frying pan, sauté celery, onion, bay leaf, crabmeat, shrimp, hot sauce, mustard, salt and pepper in additional butter.
4. Add the roux to the sauce mixture and simmer for 5 minutes.
5. Remove the bay leaf from the mixture.
6. Stir in dry white wine.
7. Stuff each red snapper with the filling.
8. Place stuffed fish in a baking dish and bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 40-60 minutes.
Makes: 4 servings.
